reference: Yɩ kaara ma na yɩ turo nɩtãa lɛ ɩn mɩ na kaara a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto naa turo wʊ.
hypothesis: yε kara ma, na yii tu, na taana ε me na kara a Yesu Kristo na tu

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka yɩ bɔ̃ɔn ɩka, daba jaa ju lɛ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto, ka a pɔɔ jaa ju mɩ ɩ a wʊ sɩrɛ, ka a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ju mɩ ɩ Nãaŋmɩn.

reference: Bojũu daba baa dɔ̃ɔ yi a pɔɔ pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ pɔɔ lɛ dɔ̃ɔ yɩ a daba pɔ.
hypothesis: Wodaa dababa donyí apopoii. Tije polle donyí adababa.

reference: Nãaŋmɩn mɩ ba dɔ̃ɔ mɛ daba pɔɔ jũu ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ mɛn pɔɔ daba jũu.
hypothesis: Naa ma, na da dombe da ba po juo. Tikee wunmen po da ba juo.

reference: A nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ jũu nɩ a malakasɩ jũu, a pɔɔ sɛɛn ɩka wʊ tara a tʊ̃ɔfʊ jãnɛ a wʊ ju pɔ.
hypothesis: Anitono juo ne amalkasijuo, aposen eka wotara atowafo jine ewujupo.

reference: A sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ, pɔɔ ba so wʊ mãɛ ɛ, daba mɩ ba so wʊ mãɛ ɛ.
hypothesis: a si sor yon po ba so o mian da ba men ba so o mian

reference: Bojũu daba pɔ lɛ a pɔɔ yi, ka pɔɔ mɩ ma dɔɔ daba. Tɩchɛ a yele a jaa yin Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃.
hypothesis: Bɔjuu, dɔbɔpɔlɛɛ apuɔ yi, kapaɔ mɛɛ ma dɔɔ dɔbɔ. Tɛkɛɛ ayiiri ajayi yi namɔɔ.

reference: Yɩn mãɛ yɩ pɛkaa. A sɛɛn ka pɔɔ na sʊɔrɔ Nãaŋmɩn tɩ ba pɔɔ a ju bɩɩ?
hypothesis: yɛn mɛ yɛ pɛ kɑ ɑ sɛn kɑ pɔnɑ sɔrɔ nɑ ŋmɛn tɛ bɑ pɔ ɑ dʒu bɛ.

reference: A befʊ nyãna mɩ ba wiil yɩ ɩka ala ɩ daba mɩ tur jukɔɔl, a ɩn vã kʊ wʊ ɛ?
hypothesis: A de vin yɛn a min ba wile eka, ala e daba mitul jukor. A in vinko we.

reference: Tɩchɛ ala ɩ pɔɔ lɛ wa bar a wʊ jukɔɔl ka a wooro a ba ɩ wʊ danʊ̃ɔ lɛ ɛ? Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn lɛ kʊ wʊ a jukɔɔl ka a ɩ a wʊ bʊ̃pɔɔraa.
hypothesis: Te a à le pole wàra, a wù jukol, ka à wuro, à ba i wo dan nua le, bo ju na ngue le ku a jukol ka i awo bon pua la.

reference: Ala ɩ nɩrɛ wa chɩrɛ na a yele anyãna, sɩn nɩ a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo ba lɛ tara yele jaa go ɛ.
hypothesis: n-iŋra wacchira ayil anyan sen-iŋ anang-puro balatara yir-yago

reference: A ala na tu ka ɩn wiil yɩ, tɩ n kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ dãn yɩ ɛ, bojũu a yɩ lɔ̃ɔ taa ma maal yɩn dɛɛr gar a vɩla.
hypothesis: Ala nɛ tu ka n wilɛ, tɛn kon tu da n yɛɛ, bo jun ayɛlɔ ta mam baal yɛn dɛɛ gar a blɛ.

reference: A yeldɔ̃ɔ nɩ nyã, n wõn ɩka yɩn ma wa lɔ̃ɔ taa na puor, yɩ ma ooro nɩ taa, ka n sɔɔ de ɩka, a lɛ ben be sɩrɛ jaa.
hypothesis: a yel don'a nya en wene ka yene mo lon ta ne puo yo ma oren'e ta ka en so de eka alle ben be sira gya

reference: A sɛɛ naa ka tɛɛ taa na be a yɩ pɔ, ka a wiil buor sʊɔ na sɔɔ Nãaŋmɩn.
hypothesis: Asɛɛ na katɛtɛɛnɛ Bɛɛyɛpɔɔ, ka awi bwor, suna soona mwɛɛ.

reference: Yɩn ma wa lɔ̃ɔ taa, a ba ɩ a Yesu kũu bʊ̃diir lɛ yɩ ma dire ɛ.
hypothesis: yɛn ma a loŋ ta. A ba yi a yie so kuŋ buŋ dii le yɛn ma diri.

reference: Bojũu yɩn ma wa dire, ãsʊɔ jaa ma bʊ̃n dire na yɩ maa gu taa ɛ. Ka a bamɩne ma wa jɛ̃n kɔ̃, tɩchɛ ka a bamɩne mɩ ma nyũ buu.
hypothesis: bo juun yimma wadirɛ, nsuo jaa ma buundire na yima gutai ka abɔmminman wa janko, tɛɛ ca ka abɔmminɛ mema nyuubu.

reference: A mɔ̃ yaa tara yie yɩn na ma di tɩ nyũ a be ɛ? Bɩɩ yɩ kaara naa a Nãaŋmɩn puorbo pɔrɔ na yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ a bala na ba tara bon jaa vã? N 'yɛr bo kʊ yɩ? A mɔ̃ n dãn yɩ nɩ a yele nyã ɔ? N kʊ̃ ɩ lɛ ɛ!
hypothesis: A mo ya tɛri ye, yɛ nɛmɛ di ti nyuu a bɛ yɛ. Bɛ yɛ karina a nangu puru bɛ poro na yɛ dyɔ na a bala na ma tɛri bɛ nja vi, ɛn nyɛ bɛ kɔ yɛ, a mo ɛn da yɛ nɛ a yɛlɛ nyau. Nku ɛ lɛ.

reference: Bojũu a wiilfʊ 'lɔ ɩn nyɛ yi a sɩ Soro sɛ̃, lɛ mɩ lɛ ɩn wiil yɩ. A tãsɔɔ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ jaa ban na gar yɔ̃ɔ a sɩ Soro Yesu, wʊ den a paanʊ̃ɔ, tɩ puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan.
hypothesis: bɔ jɔɔn awi fɔlɔɔ en yie yi asisɔrɔ sɛin. Lɛmɛ lɔ en wiyie. Attansɔɔ lɔnɛ jaabɛɛ na ngar yɔɔ asisɔrɔ yesu. Wudɛn apaanuɔ ti puonamɛ yan.

reference: Wʊn wa puor Nãaŋmɩn yãan baar, wʊ ŋmaan a paanʊ̃ɔ tɩ 'yɛr, “Nyã lɛ ɩ a n ãgãn na wʊ kʊ yɩ, yɩ ma maala a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ tɩɛrɛ nɩ ma.”
hypothesis: Wuoŋ wa puo na a ŋ yamba, wuoŋ waana a paana a teɛɛr. Nyala yie aayii engang na wuo kuye. Yie ma maala ane tono tierane ma.

reference: A lɛ nɩ wʊ ju lɛ ban wa di baar, wʊ den a ŋmel nyuraa na wʊ 'yɛrɛ, “A dãa na be a ŋmele nyãna pɔ lɛ ɩ a n jãɩ a Nãaŋmɩn na de bin a nɛtɩr paalaa, yɩ ma maala a nɩtɔ̃nɔ̃ yɩn ma wa nyuro na yɩ tɩɛrɛ nɩ ma.”
hypothesis: A leno jule, ban wa dibar, wodene angbol ngura na wo tyere. Adana be angbolen ngana po, na yi ai jin, ananguna dibin, annete pala, yimammala anetonon, yinimawon nguro, na yi tyere no.

reference: Sɔ̃ɔ jaa yɩn ma wa ɔɔrɔ a paanʊ̃ɔ nyãna, na yɩ nyuro nɩ a ŋmele nyãna, yɩ mʊɔlɔ 'yɛrɛ a sɩ Soro kũu 'yɛr tɩ tãn a wʊ waa daar.
hypothesis: So ja yɛn ma wa ɔɔro, a paa no nya na yii njuro ne agbele nya na yɛɛ mbuɔlo yɛre, asisurukuu yɛr, titã awo wa da.

reference: A lɛ jũu, nɩrɛ nyã na ɔɔrɔ a paanʊ̃ɔ nyã, na wʊ nyuro nɩ a ŋmele nyã nɩ ba bãma, wʊ maal yelbier nɩ a sɩ Soro ãgãn nɩ a wʊ jãɩ.
hypothesis: A le jɔŋ, n dra nya na ɔrɔ a pãa no nya. Na wunjɔrɔ ne a ngbɛlɛ nya, ne baba ma, wu mbaa yier buɛr, ne asisɔrɔ ɛ gan, ne a wuje.

reference: Nɩrɛ jaa wʊ ma bɛɛr a wʊ mãɛ kaa tɩ pãa 'wɔb a paanʊ̃ɔ nyã, na wʊ nyũn a ŋmele nyã.
hypothesis: Andere ja uma bere a o meka te pa o a pa no nya na o nyun a ngele.

reference: Bojũu nɩrɛ jaa na ɔɔrɔ na wʊ nyuro tɩ ba bɔ̃ɔn ɩka a sɩ Soro ãgãn lɛ ɛ, wʊ 'wɔb nyũn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ a wʊ mãɛ.
hypothesis: bo junre jaana or na unguro te ba bon eka a soro egan le wobe nuun yaa tofo gya a wumi.

reference: Ala lɛ so ka a yɩ yɔɔ bal na yɩ bɩɛrɛ, ka a yɩ yɔɔ jie mɩ kpire.

reference: Ala ɩ sɩ tɔɔr a sɩ mãɛ 'yɛr, a sɩ Soro kʊ̃ lɛ tɔɔr a sɩ 'yɛr go ɛ.
hypothesis: ala se tɔr a se miɛr, a se soro kulo tɔr a se ier go

reference: A sɩ Soro wa tɔɔr a sɩ 'yɛr, toor lɛ wʊ tɔɔ sɩ, na wʊ taa wa lɔ̃ɔ sɔ̃ɔn sɩ nɩ a bala na ba puoro ɛ.
hypothesis: Asɛsɛro wator asɛgyar. Torla watorse na wotta wallon son sene abala namba pur.

reference: A lɛ jũu, n taa Yesu turbo, yɩn ma wa lɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ taa ɩka yɩ di, yɩ ma gu taa.
hypothesis: ale ju enta ye si turbo ye no wa lo na ta eka yi di yi ma gu ta

reference: Ala ɩ kɔ̃ kʊrɔ na ãsʊɔ, wʊ ma di be a wʊ yir, ka a yɩn wa lɔ̃ɔ taa dire, a ta wa ɩ Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ kʊ yɩ ɛ. Maa wa tʊ̃ɔ tɩ, ɩn man yɩ naa a ala na chɛ.
hypothesis: À la è kon korona insu wo, woma dibe ewo yir, ka i yin walao ta dire, ata wa è na wo yirto fu ko ye, ma wa tuwonte, en ma yi na a à la nache.

reference: Ala ɩ n ma tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a nɩbɛ kɔkɔ bʊrsɩ a jaa, naa tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr a malakasɩ kɔkɔɛ, tɩchɛ naa ba tara nʊ̃fʊ ɛ, ɩn kaara naa fɩka kur ban ŋmiere a wʊ pɔɔrɔ gɔ̃mɔ̃.
hypothesis: ala èma tuon yar andeba kokor bursi aja na tuon yar amalkase kokoy. Teke nambatar nofye n kar na fiku kurba ngire awu poworo gon

reference: Ala ɩ n tara naa a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ kʊfʊ, naa bɔ̃ɔ a yelsɔɔlsɩ a jaa, naa bɔ̃ɔ yɛ̃ jaa bʊrɔ, ka ala ɩ n mɩ tara na sɔɔfʊ naa ma 'yɛr tɔ̃n ka a ir, tɩchɛ naa ba tara nʊ̃fʊ ɛ, n ɩn bʊ̃pɔrɔ.
hypothesis: Ala e n tarna a na mɔ ɩn eɛ fɔ kufu. Na bɔ ɩyɛlɔ sɔɔ se a ja, na bɔ yɛn ja bɔɔ. Ka ala e e metarna sɔɔfo, na ma yɛn ton ka a ɩr, tɩ cɛ na ma tarna fɛ, ɩ ɩn bɔn pɔ.

reference: Ala ɩ n den a n bʊ̃tarsɩ a jaa põ nɔ̃n dẽme, naa sɔɔ ɩka ba de a n ãgãn 'yɔ̃ɔ bũu 'lɩraa pɔ, tɩchɛ naa ba tara nʊ̃fʊ ɛ, n ba tara tɔ̃nɔ̃ ɛ.
hypothesis: Naa Ɛɛ ɛn dɛn a ɛn bɔntɛɛsɛ ayɛa pɔɔ nɔɔndɛmɛ. Naa sɔ ɛka ba dɛɛ ɛnga yɔɔbɔɔn nɛra pɔ. Tɛkyɛɛ naa mbatarɛnɔ fɔyɛ, ɛm batarɛ tɔnɛ.

reference: Nʊ̃fʊ ma tara na kãnyir, nʊ̃fʊ ma maala na vɩla, waa jɩɛlɛ nɩrɛ bon ɛ, waa bʊɔrɔ yuor ɛ, waa 'mɔɔrɔ wʊ mãɛ ɛ.
hypothesis: No fa matare na kanjir, no fa ma mbala na vla. Wa jere ni re bone, wa booro yure, wa booro wu miɛ.

reference: Nʊ̃fʊ ba tara nɛtuo ɛ, waa bʊɔrɔ wʊ yõ tɛɛ bomo ɛ, wʊ maa nyɛ suur fɔɔ ɛ, waa 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ nɩrɛ pʊ̃ɔm ɛ.

reference: Nʊ̃fʊ ba nʊ̃ yelbier jie ɛ, tɩchɛ wʊ ma nʊ̃n yelmãɛ jie.

reference: Nʊ̃fʊ ma gun taa lɛ sɔ̃ɔ jaa, wʊ ma sɔɔn yele a jaa, waa baala ɛ, nʊ̃fʊ ma sɔɔn ka a wõ wʊ.
hypothesis: Nufu mogo taale sonja. Woma son yele aja. Wabaale. Nufu mogo ka awuna.

reference: Nʊ̃fʊ maa ɩ faa ɛ, Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ na wa ŋmaa naa, ka a kɔkɔ dãgɩlsɩ 'yɛrfʊ mɩ wa tɛɛ, ka a bɔ̃ɔfʊ mɩ wa po chen.
hypothesis: no foma i fa na nuyere ife na wogba na ka kɔkɔ dingisi ye mi wate ka abɔnfo mi wa puche

reference: Bojũu a bɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊfʊ ɩn ŋmaa, ka a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr 'yɛrfʊ mɩ ɩ ŋmaa,
hypothesis: Bò yuo a bon fu kofo fɔ emwa, ka na we yere, yere fu me emwa.

reference: tɩchɛ a bʊ̃mãɛ wa wa, a bʊ̃gãagiel na bɔr naa.
hypothesis: tɛkyɛ abum ye wowa abunga ngɛɛ na bɔra

reference: A lɛ daar ɩn ɩ a bibile, bibi'yɛr lɛ n ma 'yɛrɛ, naa tara a bibiyɛ̃ naa ma tɩɛrɛ a bibitɩɛr. Tɩchɛ ɩn wa ɩ nɩkpɛ̃ɛ baar, n lɔb a bibiyele a jaa bar.
hypothesis: Ala daa n i a bibilie, bibilie yele ɛ ma yele. Na tara a bibilie, na ma tiere a bibilie tiere. Tɛ kyɛɛ ɛn wa ɛnɛ kpeɛ ba, n love a bibilie yele a jaa ba.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ, chãana pɔ lɛ sɩ kaara jaa tũfuru, tɩchɛ sɩn wa tuor taa nɩ gbie. Pʊ̃pãanyã 'lɔ ŋmaa lɛ n bɔ̃ɔ, tɩchɛ ɩn pãa wa bɔ̃ɔ wʊn baar nɩtãa lɛ wʊ mɩn bɔ̃ɔ ma.
hypothesis: pompanɛ ŋlo, cana polɛ se karɛ jaa tumfu, tekyɛ sinwotu taa niŋ bie, pompanɛ ŋlo, ŋwala ɛm bɔŋ, tekyɛ ɛn pan wa bɔŋ woŋ bar nɛ taa lɛ wuon mɛn bɔŋ.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã a yelsɩ ata anyãna lɛ ba tɛɛrɛ ɛ, sɔɔfʊ, tɩɛrtɔfʊ jie nɩ nʊ̃fʊ. Tɩchɛ a anyãna a jaa pɔ, nʊ̃fʊ lɛ gar a jaa.
hypothesis: Pampa, anyɛ sa-ta anyan-la, batere sofo, tiɛ-to fu jiɛ, nɛn-nu fo, ti-ce anyan-la aja-po, nu-fu-la gar-aja.

reference: Bojũu n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka a yele nyã wʊ sɔɔl yɩ ɛ, n yɛɛr. A julõjuur dɔ̃ɔ geru pɔɔ a sɩ sãakpãmɩne ba jaa ka ba jaa tɩ kpɛ a man jɩɛ pɔ gɔ̃ɔ.
hypothesis: ba jua ni ma pɔre ka ayεlε nyaa wosoro yε, i yε. A julo julo dɔɔ gerɔ pɔ a sisã pɔ mini. Ba ja, ka ba ja ti kpε aman jε pɔ gɔɔ.

reference: Ba jaa tun a Mosesɩ puor ka a julõjuur geru pɔɔ ba, a ba tɩ kpɛ a man jɩɛ gɔ̃ɔ.
hypothesis: Bajat tun amosis pu ka dillonjo gir poba Abatepe amanjie goni

reference: Ba jaa lɛ di a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃dibʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃,
hypothesis: Ma jale di anangwi sie, bunde boye la

reference: na ba nyũ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃nyũ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃, bojũu ba jaa nyũn yi a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ na dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a kʊsɩr pie 'mataa chiine ba, a kʊsɩr pie 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto.
hypothesis: na banyuo anangonosiɛ buñu buyeɛ lono. Bojun, bajaa nyunji anangonosiɛ lono, na do i akosi piɛ bantachiina ba. Akosi piɛ lono lɛ i a Yesu Kristo.

reference: A anyã a jaa pɔ, tɩ Nãaŋmɩn pʊɔ ba pɛl ba ɛ, na wʊ nyɛ suur kʊn ba, ka a ba kũn yɛ̃yɛl be a mɔgɔ̃ɔ pɔ.
hypothesis: Anya ajapo tenna mufo ba pellu be na wenye sukonba ka abakun yenyel be amago

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã, a yele anyãna ɩn kpãafʊ gã, ɩka sɩ taa de a sɩ tɩɛr 'yɔ̃ɔ yelbier pɔ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ ban dɔ̃ɔ ɩ ɛ.
hypothesis: Pompanya, ayɛrɛ anyɛn ɛn pwafuga, ɛkɛ si taa de asitiɛ yonyɛɛ bi pɔy. Nɛta le bɛndɔn yɛ

reference: Yɩ taa puoro tɩbɛ nɩtãa lɛ a bamɩne na dɔ̃ɔ puor a tɩɩ ɛ, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “A nɩbɛ jɛ̃n na ba di na ba nyũ, tɩ pãa ir sɛ bãnɛ.”

hypothesis: tɛkyɛ abɛɛla a naŋ mɛna loŋ boɔ a juo nɛbɛ. Ne abɛɛla namba i a juo nɛbɛ. Kiriso lɛ i a naŋ mɛna ŋmɛɛ o ne a naŋ mɛɛ.

reference: Bojũu Nãaŋmɩn jɔlʊ̃ ɩn yɛ̃ gar a nɩrɛ yɛ̃, ka a Nãaŋmɩn balfʊ tara kpɛ̃ɔ gar a nɩrɛ kpɛ̃ɔ.
hypothesis: O ɲo naŋ mi jɔɔlɔ ɩŋ yaaŋ gar, anrɛ yɛ. Ka naŋ mi balfu tara kbaŋ gar anrɛ kbaŋ.

reference: N yɛɛr, yɩ tɩɛr a lɛ yɩn dɔ̃ɔ be tɩ a Nãaŋmɩn wa bʊɔl yɩ, nɩsaal kaafʊ pɔ, a yɩ yɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yɛ̃ dẽme ɛ, a yɩ yɔɔ ba dɔ̃ɔ ɩ yuor dẽme ɛ, yaa ɩ nãmɩne bibiir ɛ.
hypothesis: Yɛ, yɛtɛ nne yɛn dɔnbɛ. Tɛɛ nna nwuɔ boɔlie. Nɛ sa ka fu pɔɔ, ayɛ yoo ba dɔn i yɛndeme, ayɛ yoo ba dɔn i yuurudeme. Ya inɛnni bi biiri.

reference: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn ir naa a wɛr nyã jɔl bon 'yɔ̃ɔn a yɛ̃ dẽme vã, Nãaŋmɩn lɛ ir naa a wɛr nyã bʊ̃balaa na wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔn a kpãɛn dẽme vã.
hypothesis: Tye naŋmule ira a wɛrɛŋa jɔlbɔne yɔn a yɛn demivii. Naŋmule ira a wɛrɛŋa jɔlbɔne bala na wɔ yɔn a kwiɛn demivii.

reference: Nãaŋmɩn ma ir naa a wɛr bon ba 'yɔ̃ɔnaa, a ala a nɩbɛ na kaara pɔrɔ, nɩ a nɩbɛ bala gba nɩrɛ jaa na ba 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, wʊ ɩ naa nɩtɔ̃ ka a bon 'lɔ a wɛr na 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ka wʊ ɩ pɔrɔ,
hypothesis: Naŋu ma ira awɛɛ bun ba yɔɔ na, a ala anɛɛ bɛ na kaara pɔrɔ nɛɛ andɛɛ balagwa nɛrɛ jaana ba yɔɔ nɛ. Wɔɛɛ nani tɔɔ ka bun dɔɔ awɛɛ na yɔɔ nɔ, ka woɛɛ pɔrɔ.

reference: ka nɩrɛ jaa taa bʊɔrɔ yuor a wʊ niem ɛ.
hypothesis: Kanre jaata boore yuur au niime.

reference: A wʊ jũu lɛ yɩ be a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ, 'lɔ lɛ ɩ a yɛ̃ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ kʊ sɩ, na wʊ ɩ a sɩ torfʊ nɩ chɛchɛ nɩ a faafʊ.
hypothesis: Au djoole yippe ay Yesu Kristo djo. Dala e ayen yi ana nwe si an kosi. Na o e a si tor fu ne tje tje ne afa fu.

reference: A lɛ jũu, nɩtãa lɛ an sɛb a Nãaŋmɩn gãn pɔ, “Vɛ̃ ka a 'lɔ na bʊɔrɔ yuor, wʊ bʊɔrɔ a yuor a sɩ Soro 'yɔ̃ɔ.”
hypothesis: Alè ju ne taale an seb an a mu gano po 24 log na buro yuo wu buro ayuo a si suru yuo.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã, n yɛɛr, n ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ kʊfʊsɩ yele a sɔɔl yɩ ɛ.
hypothesis: Pampa nya enye mbabore ka a nango siye ko fise yele asolye

reference: Yɩ bɔ̃ɔn naa a lɛ daar yɩn dɔ̃ɔ ɩ a tɩbɛ dẽme, a tɩbɛ anyãna na ba tara nyɛvʊr ɛ, tɔɔ yɩn 'yɔ̃ɔ bɛlfʊ pɔ.
hypothesis: Yɛn bonɛ, a ladaa yin don a atubudeme. Atubi anyɛnnamba tare n’ya vure. To yin yonnɛ bɛnfo

reference: A lɛ jũu, n 'yɛrɛ na kʊrɔ yɩ ɩka, nɩrɛ jaa ba be na wa 'yɛrɛ nɩ Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ na wʊ 'yɛr ɩka Yesu lɛ wʊ pɔrɔ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ ɛ, nɩrɛ jaa mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr ɩka, Yesu lɛ ɩ a sɩ Soro ka a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ ba be a wʊ 'yɔ̃ɔ ɛ.
hypothesis: A le jun, a yerna koro yi eka. N ra jaba be na wa yerne naŋo sie. Na wa yer eka Yesu la wuo poro yone. N ra jame kuntu yer eka Yesu la e asisoro ka naŋo sie ba be awo yone.

reference: A kʊfʊsɩ tɛɛn taa, tɩchɛ a jaa yin a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ sɛ̃.
hypothesis: Naa ko fo se tenta. Te che a ja yi n’anamusie

reference: Tʊ̃tʊ̃nsɩ mɩ tɛɛn taa, tɩchɛ a jaa tʊ̃nɔ̃ na kʊrɔ a sɩ Soro.
hypothesis: Tontose me tenta te cha aja tu na na kro asiso.

reference: Tʊ̃tʊ̃nsɩ tʊ̃fʊ mɩ tɛɛn taa, tɩchɛ a Nãaŋmɩn bʊ̃'yen nyã lɛ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a jaa a nɩbɛ 'yɔ̃ɔ.
hypothesis: Ton ton se, ton fo me tenta. Te cɛ anna n bɔ yɛ nyalɛ, ton no aja, an dɛbɛ yɔ.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã a Nãaŋmɩn den a wʊ Sɩɛ kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa a wʊn tʊ̃ɔ de sʊ̃ʊn a wʊ taaba.
hypothesis: pampanya anangme den awo siako en sowa ja awo nton deson awota

reference: Ɩ̃sʊɔ a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nyãna lɛ ma kʊ wʊ a yɛ̃ 'yɛr, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ yɛ̃ bɔ̃ɔfʊ, a Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen 'lɔ̃nɔ̃ lɛ kʊrɔ a jaa.
hypothesis: Kɔri-so asɛɛ bɔn yɛnɛ lɛ maku ayɛn yɛnɛ na womaku kɔri-so yɛn bɔn fo. Asɛɛ bɔn yɛn lɔn lɛ koro aja.

reference: A Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nyã lɛ ma kʊ ãsʊɔ sɔɔfʊ, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ kpɛ̃ɔ, a wʊ sãana nɩ baalsɩ.
hypothesis: Asɛa bɔɛ nyɛ lɛ makɔ ɛnsuo sɔfɔ. Na wo mɛkɔ ɛnsuo kɔɛ. Awo saana nɛ baa

reference: Na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ kpɛ̃ɔ, a wʊ mɩ tʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩ nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃, na wʊ kʊ ãsʊɔ a wʊ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛrɛ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛr, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ jʊ̃mɔ̃ a wʊ bɔ̃ɔ a 'lɔ na ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ nɩ a 'lɔ na ba ɩ ɛ, na wʊ mɩ kʊ ãsʊɔ a wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔ dãgɩl a 'yɛrsɩ, na wʊ chɛnɛ kʊ ãsʊɔ mɩ ka wʊ ma tʊ̃ɔ lɩɛb a 'yɛr dãgɩlsɩ anyãna.
hypothesis: naa wo ko ensuɔ kpɛɛn awo mi tuonaa ne dapaatuma naa wo ko ensuɔ a wo tuonaa yerɛ anaamie na woomi ko ensuɔ jumaa awo bon adɔ na e anaamie na adɔ naba yɛ na wo mi ko ensuɔ awo ma tuonaa dingiri a yere se na woomi kyɛnɛ ko ensuɔ mee ka wo ma tuonaa liyɛ a yere dingiri se anya

reference: A anyãna a jaa ɩ naa a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ, a wʊ de kʊ ãsʊɔ jaa a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ.
hypothesis: A ɲɛna a ja, ina a na ŋmwa siɛ bon tomɔle a wu diɛ ko nɛ so a ja a le won boor.

reference: A ãgãn ɩn bʊ̃'yen, bʊ̃yɔɔ na sɔɔ mar mar, a bʊ̃marsɩ anyã na sɔɔ waa, tɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen tɛɛ lɛ wʊ ɩ. Lɛ lɛ a mɩ kaara a Kɩrɩsɩto 'yɔ̃ɔ.
hypothesis: Nga en ga en bɔn bɔn yo na sɔn bar ba. A bɔn bar se anya na sɔn wa. Te ngan bɔn tɛlɛ wae. Lɛlɛ a me kaar a krise

reference: Bojũu sɩ jaa son a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ, nɩ a wʊ Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen 'yɔ̃ɔ a ãgãn bʊ̃'yen pɔ, ka Juu nɩrɛ lɛ fʊ ɩ bɩɩ, faa ɩ Juu nɩrɛ ɛ. Ka gbãgbaa lɛ fʊ ɩ bɩɩ, sumɩne lɛ fʊ ɩ, Nãaŋmɩn den a wʊ Sɩɛ bʊ̃'yen nyã kʊ sɩ jaa.
hypothesis: Gjun si jasion ananmewkwon ne awusie boyon a engamboyonpo. Kajunra lafo e, bi, fa ijunra, ka gbangbalafae, bi, sumlelafo e, nanyimden awusie boyen nyakusijon.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã a ba ɩ jibʊ̃'yen lɛ a ãgãn tara ɛ, tɩchɛ jiyɔɔ lɛ wʊ tara.
hypothesis: pampanya aba'e jibo'inle a engantare ti che ji yole wo tara

reference: Ala ɩ gbɛr wa 'yɛr naa ɩka, n ba ɩ nũu ɛ, a lɛ jũu n ba pʊɔ a ãgãn pɔ ɛ. A lɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ a waa ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ ɛ.
hypothesis: Ala è gberwa yere eka. Mba inu wa. Ala jonu mba pwa egan pwae. Ale kun ton ven, awa egan ji en soe.

reference: Ka ala ɩ toor mɩ 'yɛr naa, n ba ɩ nɩbir ɛ, a lɛ jũu n ba pʊɔ a ãgãn pɔ ɛ. A lɛ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ vɛ̃ a waa ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ ɛ.
hypothesis: a la i tom i yaara a mma i nimburee a la jun a mma pua i engin puae a la kun tuɔɔ ven, a waa i a engin ji insoro

reference: Ala ɩ a ãgãn wʊ jaa ɩn nɩbir, ŋmɩnɛ lɛ wʊn taa ma ɩ wõ 'yɛr? Ka ala ɩ a ãgãn wʊ jaa mɩ ɩn toor, ŋmɩnɛ wʊn ɩ mɩ wa wõ nyũu.
hypothesis: ala yiri nga wuja in nimbi muna le won taa ma i won ya ka ala yiri nga wuja mi in to muna won i mini won yu

reference: Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ choo taa a jidẽdẽme anyãna ãsʊɔ jaa a ãgãn pɔ, a lɛ wʊn bʊɔrɔ ba.
hypothesis: tekenaŋ malɛ chucha ajidindeme. Anyɛnaŋ esowa ja'a ɛŋ ganpɔ. Alɛ wun bɔrɔ bɛ

reference: Ala ɩ a jaa ɩn bʊ̃'yen, nyɩnɛ lɛ a ãgãn mɩn taa be?
hypothesis: Alajain boyen. Nyaala angan, menta

reference: Jiyɔɔ lɛ be a ãgãn pɔ, tɩchɛ a wʊ ɩ ãgãn bʊ̃'yen.
hypothesis: Gie le bee a engã bo te ce, a oo e engã bo e.

reference: Ala lɛ so ka a nɩbir kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ a nũu, n ba bʊɔrɔ fʊ ɛ. A ju mɩ kʊ̃ tʊ̃ɔ 'yɛr kʊ gbɛr, n ba bʊɔrɔ fʊ ɛ.
hypothesis: A lɛsɔ ka nimbere kɔntwɛn yɛ kɔ anuu n ba bɔrɔ fɔ yɛ. A dume kɔntwɛn yɛ kɔ gbɛ n ba bɔrɔ fɔ yɛ.

reference: Yɩ kaa, a ãgãn jiir ala na ba kpɛ̃mɛ ɛ, ala lɛ sɩ ma mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir kaara.
hypothesis: Yika, a engengir ala nambakume. Ala lasima monimbika.

reference: A jiir ala sɩn ma tɩɛr ɩka a ba tara 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ ɛ, ala lɛ sɩ ma bɔ̃ɔ kaara. Ka a jiir ala mɩ na ba be yõo yi fʊ ɛ, ala lɛ sɩ ma bɔ̃ɔ chɔɔr.
hypothesis: a gyerɛ n'a seɛ n'a tier ɛ ka aba tara yoon fie a la lesɛma bon kaar ka a gyerɛ a lami na ba bi yoon yi fu yɛ a la lesɛma bon cor

reference: Ka a ala mɩ na be a yõo yifʊ, sɩ maa chɔɔr a ala ɛ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn lɛ de a jiir anyãna 'mataa a ãgãn pɔ, na wʊ de 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ kʊ a jiir amɩne na ba dɔ̃ɔ tara ɛ.
hypothesis: ka alame na be yon yifu sema chor ale techena mure de ajir anyena bata engampo nawo de yon fo ku ajir amini na mado dare

reference: Ka a lɛ na vɛ̃ a dẽdẽme ɩfʊ kʊ̃ lɛ be a ãgãn pɔ ɛ, tɩchɛ ka a jaa ma sʊ̃nɔ̃ taa.
hypothesis: Kaa le ne ve, a din de mi ifo ku le be a nga poy. Tichee kaa a jaa maasinota.

reference: Ala ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ wa bɩɛrɛ naa, a ãgãn jiir a jaa mɩ ma bɩɛrɛ naa. Ala ɩ a ãgãn jie ãsʊɔ jaa mɩ wa nyɛn 'yɔ̃ɔfʊ, a ãgãn wʊ jaa mɩ ma chɩlɛ naa.
hypothesis: Ala ɛ a engɛ n gɛɛn suɔ wa bɛɛre na. A engɛ n gɛɛr a jaamɛ ma bɛɛre na. Ala ɛ a engɛ n gɛɛn suɔ jaa, mɛ wa nyɛn yɔn fɔ. A engɛ n wɛɛ ja, mɛ ma kyɛlɛ na.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã yɩn lɛ lɔ̃ɔ taa ɩ a Yesu Kɩrɩsɩto ãgãn, ka yɩ ãsʊɔ jaa ɩ a jie ãsʊɔ.
hypothesis: kampa yir laa lon ta i a Yesu Krsito eng gan kaye i so ja i ajii i so

reference: A pupuorbiir banyãna pɔ lɛ a Nãaŋmɩn de nie ir a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ, na wʊ lɛ tu ir a wʊ 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ, na wʊ lɛ tu ir a wʊ wiwiilbe, na wʊ lɛ ir a bala mɩn na tʊ̃nɔ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃, na wʊ ir a bala mɩn na sãana baalsɩ, na wʊ ir bamɩne ka ba sʊ̃nɔ̃ nɩbɛ, na wʊ lɛ ir bamɩne na kaara a tʊ̃mɔ̃, nɩ a bala mɩ na bɔ̃ɔ a kɔkɔɛ dãgɩlfʊ.
hypothesis: a pupubi banya na poler a nangu dini ir anetonsi na wuletu ir a wu yerbe na wuletu ir a wu wilbe na wuletu ir abalamen na tuno ande ba tuno na wu ir abalamen na sanna basie na wu ir bemine ka ba sunonde be na wuletu ir bemine na kaara atumo ne abalamen na bon akokoy dengeli

reference: A mɔ̃ ba jaa lɛ ɩ a nɩtʊ̃nsɩ bɩɩ? Bɩɩ ba jaa lɛ ɩ a Nãaŋmɩn 'yɛ'yɛrbɛ ɔ? Ba jaa lɛ ɩ a wiwiilbe ɔ? Ba jaa lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ a nɛ'maa tʊ̃mɔ̃ bɩɩ?
hypothesis: A mo ba jaala e a nɛn tonso bee. Bii ba jaala e a naamu ye yɛrba. Ba jaala e a wii wilba. Ba jaala ma twɔn ton a nɛn baantu mu bee.

reference: Ba jaa lɛ wʊ kʊ a baal sãafʊ bɩɩ? Ba jaa lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ dãgɩl a ba kɔkɔɛ ɔ? Bɩɩ ba jaa lɛ ma tʊ̃ɔ a kɔkɔr dãgɩlaa lɩɛb ɔ?
hypothesis: ba jala oko abassan fube ba jala ma tɔɔ dingel abako koye biba jala ma tɔɔ akoko dingel alie

reference: Tɩchɛ yɩ mʊ̃ɔ nɩbir bɔ a kʊfʊsɩ 'lɔ na gar a jaa. Pʊ̃pãanyã, ɩn wiil yɩn a sɔr 'lɔ na gar a jaa.
hypothesis: Te kye, yimoo nimber bo ako fu sit lo na gar aja, pumpanya in wiiliin asar lo na gar aja.

reference: Pʊ̃pãanyã n bʊɔrɔ naa ɩka n 'yɛr a chɩɛrfʊ yɩn bʊɔrɔ ɩka yɩ chɩɛr sʊ̃ʊn a Nãaŋmɩn nɩbɛ. Yɩ mɩ maal a lɛ ɩn man kʊ a Galatiya paal pupuorbiir gbulsɩ ɩka ba maal.
hypothesis: kampanya, buora na eka, yer a cherfu, yebora eka, yechia soon, anangondebe, yememba ale, en manko, agalati ya paal puopuo bii, bulise eka banma.

reference: A Pɛ̃nfʊ divɩɛ bio daar jaa, a bɩbir 'lɔ na de nie ãsʊɔ jaa wʊ ma ir a libie jã a lɛ wʊn ma nyɛ na yɩ bine, ka maa wa tɩ a ta lɛ ɩ chɩɛrfʊ go ɛ.
hypothesis: A pɛɛ voodi bii bii daa jaa, a biibii lono dɛɛni ɛ, nɛɛso jaa woo ma iir. Ali bie ji alɛɛ won maa nya na yibine. Kama wa ti, a taara ɛɛ chiɛɛr fɔgo.

reference: Maa wa tɔ̃ɔ ta n de a gãma kʊ a nɩbɛ bala yɩn mãɛ na ir naa tʊ̃n nɩ a libie ala yɩn chɩɛr ka ba chiin a Jerusalɛm.
hypothesis: Na wotonta, i di agama ko andi ba bala, yen miene ir. Na ton ne alibie ala yen chië, kaba chi a Jerusalem.

reference: Ka ala wa ɩ fɩka a maa mãɛ sɛɛn mɩ na chen go, ba kʊ̃ bɩɛl ma.
hypothesis: Ka alwa ifu ka ama mi ya sen min a chingo ba kon biyel ma.

reference: Maa wa chen tɩ yi a Masedonɩya baar, ɩn wan a yɩ sɛ̃, bojũu be lɛ ɩn tu.
hypothesis: Ma wa cɛnte yie an mɛɛ zi do nniya ba ɛn wan a yi sɛn bo juo bɛlɛɛ intie.

reference: Amɩne sɛ̃ ɩn jɛ̃n a yɩ sɛ̃ kor bãlãa, bɩɩ ka n jãnɛ a be ka a uon wa baar, ka yɩ sʊ̃ʊ ma ka n chiine a n chenfʊ jie.
hypothesis: A m'nisa, ŋa i san kor bla, bɛɛ ka ŋa jin' a bɛ ka'a ŋuun wa bar. Ka yisuma, ka i cini, a i cini fige.

reference: N ba bʊɔrɔ ɩka n tɔ̃ɔ tɩ nyɛ yɩ a lɛ nɛ a pʊ̃pãanyã tɩ po ɛ, n tɩɛr naa ɩka n jɛ̃ a yɩ sɛ̃ kor ala ɩ a sɩ Soro sɔɔ naa.
hypothesis: Nè na puo ka a tɔɔn te nyɛɛ yi a lɛnɛ, a pɔmpaa nyɛ tuu puo. Ntera ka ɛn jɛɛ, a yɛɛ sɛn kor, ala yi a sisoora soɔ na.

reference: Tɩchɛ ɩn jɛ̃n a Efesus tẽe pɔ tɩ tãn a Pentikosɩ bɩbir.
hypothesis: Te kya ɛn jɛn a Ephesus tiempɔ, tɛ tɛ n a pentikosi bibele.

reference: Bojũu sɔr yuon kʊ ma ka ɩn tʊ̃ɔ tʊ̃ tʊ̃mɔ̃, tɩchɛ ka a nɩyɔɔ mɩ kpɛrɛ ma.
hypothesis: bonju, sar yo kuma, ka n to tun to mo, teka ka ni yo me peere mo.

reference: Ala ɩ a Timoti wa tɩ naa, yɩ kaa ka yele jaa taa kʊrɔ wʊ dãbãɛ ɛ, bojũu a sɩ Soro tʊ̃mɔ̃ lɛ wʊ tʊ̃nɔ̃ a n kaar.

reference: Bamɩne mɩ ma lɛ 'yɛr naa ɩka, bʊ̃diir ben be puor 'yɔ̃ɔ, ka a puor mɩ be be a bʊ̃diir 'yɔ̃ɔ. Tɩchɛ Nãaŋmɩn na sɔ̃ɔn a jaa ayi bar. Sɛ̃sɛ̃yele jũu ba lɛ a ãgãn be be ɛ, tɩchɛ a sɩ Soro jũu lɛ, ka a sɩ Soro mɩ be be a ãgãn jũu.

hypothesis: Akpi o nyana le, a na ni si n asisiro akumpo, ka wume na sinsi akumpo.

hypothesis: Tɛ kɛɛ nɛrɛ lo nɛ diiwumiɛ mma asisoro, lo nɛ awɔsiɛ, yɛn boɛn.

reference: Yɩ tɔɔ yi a sɛ̃sɛ̃yele pɔ. Yelbier jaa nɩrɛ na ɩrɛ ma ben a wʊ ãgãn yõo, tɩchɛ nɩrɛ 'lɔ na sɛ̃nɛ, a wʊ ãgãn lɛ wʊ maala a yelbier 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃.
hypothesis: Yɛ tɔ yɛ a sɛn sɛn yɛɛ bɔ. Yɛɛ bɛɛ jaa ndɛɛ na yɛɛ. Ma bɛɛn awɛɛ ɛngan yu. Te kɛɛ ndɛɛ lɔ na sɛnɛ. Awɛɛ ɛngan lewu ma mmaɛɛ a yɛɛ biɛɛ yɛɛn.

reference: Yaa bɔ̃ɔ ɩka a yɩ ãgãn ɩn a Nãaŋmɩn Sɩɛ puorfʊ yir ɛ? A 'lɔ na be a yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔ. A 'lɔ yɩn nyɛ yi a Nãaŋmɩn sɛ̃ ɔ? Yaa so yɩ mãɛ ɛ.

reference: Nãaŋmɩn da yɩn so. A lɛ jũu, yɩ 'yɔ̃ɔnɔ̃ Nãaŋmɩn nɩ a yɩ ãgãma.
hypothesis: Naa mo daa yii n so, a leju yie ŋoona naa mo, ne a yie ŋama.
